feed.title: Blood of Dawnwalker Guide Updates
feed.subtitle: Source-checked release, gameplay, story, FAQ, and system guides for The Blood of Dawnwalker.

entry.title: The Blood of Dawnwalker Guide & Wiki | Release, Time System, Builds
entry.summary: Verified The Blood of Dawnwalker guides for the September 3 launch, 30-day time system, human and vampire abilities, combat, characters, editions, and PC requirements.

entry.title: The Blood of Dawnwalker 30-Day Time Limit Explained
entry.summary: A complete, spoiler-light explanation of Dawnwalker’s 30 in-game days: what advances time, whether exploration is safe, and what happens at the deadline.

entry.title: What Happens After 30 Days in The Blood of Dawnwalker?
entry.summary: Running out of time is not an automatic game over in The Blood of Dawnwalker. The story continues with consequences based on your choices and preparation.

entry.title: The Blood of Dawnwalker Blood Hunger System Explained
entry.summary: How Coen’s blood hunger meter works, what happens when it empties, and whether you can feed on animals instead of important NPCs.

entry.title: Does The Blood of Dawnwalker Have Character Creation?
entry.summary: The Blood of Dawnwalker does not use a custom protagonist. Learn what can and cannot be customized when you play as Coen.

entry.title: The Blood of Dawnwalker Combat System Explained
entry.summary: How Dawnwalker combat works: directional sword attacks, blocking, parrying, Omni-Block, activation charges, human magic, and vampire powers.

entry.title: Compel Soul in The Blood of Dawnwalker Explained
entry.summary: Compel Soul is a human-form hex that lets Coen speak with the dead and unlock new information or quest branches. Here is what is confirmed.

entry.title: The Blood of Dawnwalker Day and Night System Explained
entry.summary: Compare human Coen by day with vampire Coen by night, including magic, movement, feeding, quests, and different solutions.

entry.title: Does Exploration Use Time in The Blood of Dawnwalker?
entry.summary: Exploration does not drain Dawnwalker’s 30-day clock. Learn which activities spend time and how the game warns you before a cost.

entry.title: FAQ Guides | Blood of Dawnwalker Guide
entry.summary: Concise answers for broad player questions such as open world scope, single-player status, co-op, genre comparisons, and buying decisions.

entry.title: How Long Is The Blood of Dawnwalker?
entry.summary: The developers estimate 55–70 hours for a playthrough. Learn why the 30-day story limit is not the same as real-world playtime.

entry.title: Gameplay Guides | Blood of Dawnwalker Guide
entry.summary: Combat, day and night systems, vampire powers, exploration, time pressure, stealth, feeding, skills, and survival planning.

entry.title: The Blood of Dawnwalker Has Gone Gold
entry.summary: The Blood of Dawnwalker went gold on July 15, 2026. Learn what gold status means for the September 3 release, physical copies, and a possible day-one patch.

entry.title: Blood of Dawnwalker Guide Index | All Guides
entry.summary: Complete index of Blood of Dawnwalker guide pages, organized for release prep, gameplay, walkthrough, story, technical, FAQ, and source topics.

entry.title: What Is Omni-Block in The Blood of Dawnwalker?
entry.summary: Omni-Block explained: how the accessible defense option differs from directional blocking, parrying, and free attacks in Dawnwalker combat.
